bar-text: 🔥 3 spots left this month — Delivery guaranteed in 4 days
hero-h1:
Your professional website,
delivered in 4 days.
hero-desc: High-performance, modern, tailor-made websites for entrepreneurs, freelancers and SMBs who want to dominate their market online.
services-sub: From simple showcase to full e-commerce, we handle everything — no jargon, no surprises.
srv-vitrine-p: An elegant and professional website to present your business, reassure visitors and generate qualified leads.
srv-ecom-p: Sell your products or services online with a store optimized for conversion and maximum performance.
srv-responsive-p: Every site is perfect on mobile, tablet and desktop. 72% of traffic comes from mobile — we leave nothing to chance.
srv-seo-p: Your pages are optimized from the start to appear on Google and attract qualified visitors ready to buy.
srv-perf-p: Ultra-fast sites, Lighthouse score >90, premium hosting. Every second of load time costs you clients.
srv-maint-p: Updates, bug fixes, daily backups and reactive support. You focus on your business, we handle the rest.
res-ca:
revenue generated in the first
month for Amandine C.
proc-title:
From zero to online
in 4 simple steps
proc-sub: A clear and surprise-free process, from first contact to launch.
proc-1-p: We discuss your project, goals and target audience in a 100% free 30-min call.
proc-2-p: We present a complete mockup within 48h. You approve before we write a single line of code.
proc-3-p: We build your site with the latest technologies. Track progress in real time on our client portal.
proc-4-p: Your site is published, tested and optimized. We train you on the admin panel in 1h and stay available.
prix-sub: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Pay in 3× instalments. No hidden subscription.
plan1-desc: Ideal for getting started with a professional online presence that reassures and converts.
plan2-desc: For professionals who want to stand out and generate qualified leads.
plan3-desc: A complete online store to sell online and break even within weeks.
plan1-features:
• 3-page showcase website
  • Custom design
  • Mobile responsive
  • Contact form
  • Basic SEO
  • ⚡ Delivered in 4 days
plan2-features:
• Website up to 8 pages
  • Premium custom design
  • Integrated blog
  • Advanced SEO
  • Google Analytics + Tag Manager
  • 3 months maintenance
  • ⚡ Delivered in 4 days
plan3-features:
• Unlimited product store
  • Secure online payment
  • Stock management
  • Automated emails
  • Advanced e-commerce SEO
  • 6 months maintenance
  • 2h training included
  • ⚡ Delivered in 4 days*
plan3-note: * Indicative timeline from 4 days. Depending on project complexity, the timeline may be adjusted during briefing.
avis-title:
They took the leap.
Here's what they think.
test-1: "Delivered in 4 days, beautiful site, and my clients compliment it regularly. Best investment of the year."
test-2: "I was afraid it would be complicated. Everything went smoothly, they knew exactly what I needed. 100% recommend."
test-3: "Our online store generated €3,000 in revenue in the first month. The investment paid off within weeks."
faq-1-a: As soon as we receive your content and first payment, we start immediately. Day 1: brief & mockup. Day 2: validation & development. Days 3–4: finalization, testing and launch. Simple, fast, contractually guaranteed.
faq-2-a: Our maintenance covers everything your site needs to stay performant and secure:
faq-3-q: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?
faq-3-a: We offer unlimited revisions during the design phase until you're 100% happy. And if you're still not satisfied within 14 days of delivery, we'll give you a full refund. Zero risk for you.
faq-4-q: I don't have texts or photos — can you help?
faq-4-a: Absolutely. We offer a copywriting and royalty-free image selection service. We can start from scratch and build all your brand content. Just mention it in your brief and we'll include it in the quote.
faq-5-q: Will I be able to update my site myself?
faq-5-a: Yes! Every site comes with a simple and intuitive admin interface. A 1-hour training session is included so you can update texts, images and pages on your own. No technical skills required.
faq-6-q: Will my site be visible on Google?
faq-6-a: All our sites include basic technical SEO (meta tags, speed, structure). Pro and E-commerce plans include advanced SEO with keyword audit, page optimization and Search Console submission. Your site will be indexed from day one.
contact-p: Describe your project. We'll get back to you within 24h with a concrete action plan and a personalised quote.
prospect-btn: Have a large custom project? Tell us everything →
prospect-note: Ambitious project · Full brief · Precise quote within 24h
form-legal: By submitting this form, you agree that your data will be used to contact you back. No spam.
form-message-ph: Tell us about your business, goals, target audience, timelines...
footer-tagline:
Next-generation web agency.
Websites delivered in 4 days, guaranteed.
exit-desc: Before you go, receive a free analysis of your digital presence — no commitment.
exit-close: No thanks, I'll manage on my own
